meta.title: Product Orb Face — Campaign Analysis
meta.usage: Hexagonal product orb face 3 — scroll chapter 04, corner anchor middle-right

composition_rules.notes: Charts must have no axis labels, numbers, or tick marks

midground.notes: Minimal glowing bars, one bar highlighted coral
Smooth line overlay, no data points labeled
Floating glass chips around chart suggesting stored evidence

accent.notes: Single coral bar as performance highlight

render_prompt: Abstract campaign analytics UI mockup on warm ivory #F8F6F2. Centered frosted glass dashboard card with minimalist bar chart and line graph made of indigo #4F46E5 wireframe geometry and soft glowing bars, absolutely no axis labels numbers or tick marks. One coral #E85D4C highlight bar. Four small floating frosted glass evidence chips around the chart. Premium studio lighting, front view, shallow depth of field. Clean margins for 3D texture mapping. No text, no logos, no readable data.
negative_prompt: numbers, percentages, axis labels, grid numbers, text, logos, excel screenshot, real dashboard screenshot, dark theme, cluttered UI
